title: Ashwin Conrad
workbook_filename: Catelogue of Projects Report - Ashwin Conrad.xlsx

projects.title: Safety Critical Element (SCE) Identification
projects.description: Identify and catalog Safety Critical Elements across all AltaGas facilities by cross-referencing P&IDs, SDKs, and Maximo asset databases.

tasks.title: SCE Identification - Completed Facilities
tasks.description: Facilities where P&IDs are well-documented in SDKs and SCE identification has been completed.
tasks.commentary: Majority of facilities completed. P&IDs were available in SDKs for these sites.

deliverables.title: Collect SDKs and P&IDs for all facilities
deliverables.description: Gather Safety Data Knowledge packages and P&ID drawings for every facility in scope.

deliverables.title: Define SCE identification methodology and criteria
deliverables.description: Establish the criteria for classifying an element as safety-critical based on industry standards and AltaGas policies.

deliverables.title: Complete SCE identification for well-documented facilities
deliverables.description: Walk through P&IDs, identify all SCEs, and log each element per facility.

deliverables.title: Build SCE master register for completed facilities
deliverables.description: Compile all identified SCEs into a structured register with tag numbers, descriptions, and facility assignments.

tasks.title: SCE Identification - Harmattan & EEEP
tasks.description: Harmattan and EEEP SDKs do not outline P&IDs for each tag, requiring alternative approaches to identify SCEs.
tasks.commentary: SDKs for Harmattan and EEEP lack P&ID references per tag. Attempting alternative tag-to-SCE mapping approaches.

deliverables.title: Assess Harmattan SDK gaps - identify missing P&ID references
deliverables.description: Catalog which tags in the Harmattan SDK lack P&ID cross-references and determine scope of the gap.

deliverables.title: Assess EEEP SDK gaps - identify missing P&ID references
deliverables.description: Catalog which tags in the EEEP SDK lack P&ID cross-references and determine scope of the gap.

deliverables.title: Develop alternative mapping approach for tag-to-SCE identification
deliverables.description: Create a methodology to identify SCEs at sites where SDKs do not map tags to P&IDs directly.

deliverables.title: Complete SCE identification for Harmattan
deliverables.description: Apply alternative mapping and complete the SCE register for Harmattan.

deliverables.title: Complete SCE identification for EEEP
deliverables.description: Apply alternative mapping and complete the SCE register for EEEP.

tasks.title: Maximo Tag Matching
tasks.description: Cross-reference identified SCE tags against the Maximo asset management database to validate equipment records.
tasks.commentary: Currently matching approximately 45% of tags to Maximo. Discrepancies in naming conventions and missing assets are the main blockers.

deliverables.title: Export Maximo asset database for all facilities
deliverables.description: Pull full asset lists from Maximo for every facility in scope.

deliverables.title: Build tag matching logic and automated comparison
deliverables.description: Create matching script/process to compare SCE tag numbers against Maximo records.

deliverables.title: Run initial match - resolve easy hits (~45% matched)
deliverables.description: Execute first matching pass; resolve tags with direct exact matches.

deliverables.title: Investigate and resolve unmatched tags (~55% remaining)
deliverables.description: Manually review remaining unmatched tags - naming discrepancies, missing Maximo entries, decommissioned equipment.

deliverables.title: Produce final Maximo match report with gap summary
deliverables.description: Document match rate, root causes of mismatches, and recommended Maximo updates.

tasks.title: SCE - On-Hold Facilities (PSGP-1 Dimsdale & Townsend)
tasks.description: SCE work paused for PSGP-1 Dimsdale and Townsend pending completion of their SDK validation processes.
tasks.commentary: Both facilities are currently undergoing SDK validation. SCE identification will resume once validated SDKs are available.

deliverables.title: Monitor PSGP-1 Dimsdale SDK validation progress
deliverables.description: Track SDK validation status; confirm when validated SDK is available for SCE work.

deliverables.title: Monitor Townsend SDK validation progress
deliverables.description: Track SDK validation status for Townsend; confirm when validated SDK is ready.

deliverables.title: Complete SCE identification for PSGP-1 Dimsdale
deliverables.description: Once SDK is validated, perform full SCE identification using the confirmed P&IDs.

deliverables.title: Complete SCE identification for Townsend
deliverables.description: Once SDK is validated, perform full SCE identification using the confirmed P&IDs.

tasks.title: SCE Site Review Meetings
tasks.description: Present SCE findings to each facility site team and discuss action items.
tasks.commentary: Target: complete site discussions by end of June.

deliverables.title: Prepare site-specific SCE summary packages
deliverables.description: Create a per-facility SCE summary with tag lists, Maximo match rates, and gap analysis.

deliverables.title: Schedule and conduct site review meetings
deliverables.description: Coordinate with site leads to schedule and hold review meetings for all completed facilities.

deliverables.title: Document action items and findings from site meetings
deliverables.description: Capture feedback, corrective actions, and follow-up items from each site review.

projects.title: Brazed Aluminum Heat Exchanger (BAHX) Study
projects.description: Technical study evaluating the condition, risk profile, and replacement strategy for BAHX units across AltaGas facilities.

tasks.title: BAHX Technical Analysis
tasks.description: Perform the full engineering analysis of BAHX units - operating conditions, failure modes, inspection history, and risk ranking.
tasks.commentary: Analysis complete. All BAHX units evaluated for operating envelope, failure risk, and inspection history.

deliverables.title: Collect BAHX operating data and inspection records
deliverables.description: Gather design datasheets, operating parameters, and historical inspection reports for all BAHX units.

deliverables.title: Identify failure modes and risk factors
deliverables.description: Evaluate common BAHX failure mechanisms (mercury embrittlement, thermal shock, fouling, corrosion) and apply to each unit.

deliverables.title: Complete risk ranking of all BAHX units
deliverables.description: Rank each BAHX unit by risk based on operating conditions, age, inspection findings, and failure mode applicability.

deliverables.title: Finalize analysis conclusions and recommendations
deliverables.description: Summarize findings and develop recommended actions for each unit.

tasks.title: BAHX Final Report
tasks.description: Compile the BAHX study into a formal engineering report documenting methodology, findings, and recommendations.
tasks.commentary: Report approximately 80% complete. Compiling final sections.

deliverables.title: Draft report - methodology, scope, and background
deliverables.description: Write introductory sections covering the study scope, BAHX background, and methodology.

deliverables.title: Draft report - analysis results and risk rankings
deliverables.description: Write the core technical sections presenting per-unit findings and risk rankings.

deliverables.title: Draft report - recommendations and action plan
deliverables.description: Write the recommendations section with proposed inspection, monitoring, and replacement actions.

deliverables.title: Incorporate vendor cost and lead-time data (post Apr 1 meeting)
deliverables.description: After the April 1st vendor meeting, add replacement unit cost and lead-time info to the report.

deliverables.title: Final review, formatting, and report submission
deliverables.description: Proofread, format per AltaGas standards, and submit the final BAHX report.

tasks.title: BAHX Presentation
tasks.description: Create a summary presentation to accompany the BAHX report for management and site teams.
tasks.commentary: Presentation started. Working in parallel with report finalization.

deliverables.title: Outline presentation structure and key messages
deliverables.description: Define slide flow: background, methodology, key findings, risk rankings, recommendations.

deliverables.title: Draft presentation slides
deliverables.description: Build all slides with data, charts, and summary tables from the report.

deliverables.title: Add vendor cost and lead-time slides (post Apr 1 meeting)
deliverables.description: After the vendor meeting, add replacement cost and timeline slides.

deliverables.title: Finalize and review presentation
deliverables.description: Polish visuals, review with supervisor, and finalize for delivery.

tasks.title: BAHX SOP Review
tasks.description: Review facility SOPs for BAHX units to identify any existing operational notes, restrictions, or cautions.
tasks.commentary: Waiting on SOPs for BAHX units to review for any existing comments or operational notes.

deliverables.title: Request SOPs for all BAHX-equipped facilities
deliverables.description: Contact operations/document control to obtain current SOPs covering BAHX units.

deliverables.title: Review SOPs for BAHX-related comments and restrictions
deliverables.description: Read through received SOPs and extract any operational notes, startup/shutdown cautions, or maintenance remarks about BAHX units.

deliverables.title: Incorporate SOP findings into BAHX report
deliverables.description: Add any relevant SOP observations to the final report and recommendations.

tasks.title: BAHX Vendor Meeting - April 1
tasks.description: Meet with BAHX vendor to learn about replacement unit cost, lead times, and available configurations.

deliverables.title: Prepare BAHX unit specs and questions for vendor
deliverables.description: Compile the specs of current BAHX units and prepare a list of questions about cost, lead time, and replacement options.

deliverables.title: Attend vendor meeting and capture notes
deliverables.description: Attend the April 1st meeting; record cost quotes, lead times, and configuration options.

deliverables.title: Summarize vendor data into cost/lead-time table
deliverables.description: Organize vendor quotes into a structured table for inclusion in the report and presentation.

projects.title: Corrosion Coupon Dashboard
projects.description: Power BI dashboard tracking corrosion coupon data across all AltaGas facilities.

tasks.title: Dashboard Development & Deployment
tasks.description: Build and deploy the Power BI corrosion coupon dashboard with all facility data.
tasks.commentary: Dashboard built, deployed, and in use. Historical data loaded.

deliverables.title: Gather historical corrosion coupon data for all facilities
deliverables.description: Collect and clean all available historical corrosion coupon measurement data.

deliverables.title: Design and build Power BI data model
deliverables.description: Create the data model, relationships, and DAX measures for corrosion tracking.

deliverables.title: Build dashboard visuals and report pages
deliverables.description: Create all report pages: facility overview, trend charts, coupon comparison, and alerts.

deliverables.title: Deploy to Power BI Service and validate with stakeholders
deliverables.description: Publish to the workspace, share with stakeholders, and incorporate feedback.

tasks.title: Auto-Triggered Email Data Pipeline
tasks.description: Create an automated pipeline that ingests new corrosion coupon data from emailed reports and loads it into the dashboard.

deliverables.title: Define email ingestion requirements and data format
deliverables.description: Document the email source, attachment format, field mapping, and expected cadence.

deliverables.title: Build email-triggered Power Automate / Logic App flow
deliverables.description: Create the automated flow that monitors the mailbox and triggers data extraction on new messages.

deliverables.title: Build data transformation and loading step
deliverables.description: Parse emailed data, clean and transform to match the Power BI data model, and load into the dataset.

deliverables.title: End-to-end pipeline testing and error handling
deliverables.description: Test the full pipeline with sample and live emails; add error notifications and retry logic.

deliverables.title: Deploy pipeline to production
deliverables.description: Promote the pipeline to production and confirm automatic data refresh is working.

tasks.title: Corrosion Dashboard Handoff Documentation
tasks.description: Create comprehensive documentation for the dashboard and pipeline to enable handoff to the next owner.

deliverables.title: Document data model, DAX measures, and data sources
deliverables.description: Write technical docs covering the Power BI data model, all DAX formulas, and data source connections.

deliverables.title: Document automated pipeline architecture and configuration
deliverables.description: Write a guide covering the email pipeline: flow triggers, data transformations, error handling, and monitoring.

deliverables.title: Create user guide for dashboard consumers
deliverables.description: Write a guide for end-users explaining how to navigate the dashboard, interpret the visuals, and export data.

deliverables.title: Conduct handoff walkthrough with successor
deliverables.description: Walk through all documentation and systems live with the person taking over the dashboard.

projects.title: Inspection Scope Tool
projects.description: Python tool that assists with the creation of inspection scopes. Tool is complete and deployed; handoff documentation required.

tasks.title: Inspection Scope Tool - Development
tasks.description: Build and deploy the tool that automates the creation of inspection scopes.
tasks.commentary: Tool is complete and currently in active use.

deliverables.title: Define inspection scope requirements and inputs
deliverables.description: Identify all required inputs, logic, and output formats for generating inspection scopes.

deliverables.title: Develop inspection scope generation logic
deliverables.description: Implement the core logic to produce inspection scopes from input data.

deliverables.title: Test and validate with real inspection data
deliverables.description: Run the tool against real-world data and confirm output accuracy with engineering.

deliverables.title: Deploy tool for active use
deliverables.description: Package and deploy the tool so the team can use it in daily workflows.

tasks.title: Inspection Scope Tool - Handoff Documentation
tasks.description: Create documentation so the tool can be maintained and used after handoff.

deliverables.title: Write technical documentation - code architecture and logic
deliverables.description: Document the tool's code structure, key modules, and generation logic for future developers.

deliverables.title: Write user guide - how to run the tool and interpret outputs
deliverables.description: Create a step-by-step user guide covering inputs, execution, and output interpretation.

deliverables.title: Document known limitations and future improvement ideas
deliverables.description: List any known edge cases, limitations, and potential enhancements.

deliverables.title: Conduct handoff walkthrough
deliverables.description: Walk through the tool, documentation, and codebase with the designated successor.

projects.title: PI Vision Screen Cleanup
projects.description: Long-term, background cleanup effort to improve PI Vision usability and pave the way for enterprise-wide PI screen standardization.

tasks.title: PI Vision Screen Cleanup - Units, Tags, and Navigation
tasks.description: Review and correct units, tag configuration, and navigation links on all 722 PI Vision screens. Low priority; worked on during downtime.
tasks.commentary: Very low priority. Worked on only during downtime. 722 screens total.

deliverables.title: Units cleanup - remove manual overrides, pull from PI tags
deliverables.description: Remove manually typed display units and update each data link to pull units directly from the live PI tag configuration.

deliverables.title: Tag configuration review - flag misconfigured tags
deliverables.description: Flag any tags requiring improved configuration (naming alignment, missing attributes, incorrect engineering units).

deliverables.title: Screen linking - add or correct navigation links
deliverables.description: Add or correct navigation links between screens; reference PFDs to ensure asset relationships are accurate.

projects.title: AI & Python Workflow Automation
projects.description: Self-directed initiative exploring AI and Python tools for engineering workflow automation and operational optimization.

tasks.title: AI & Python Applications - Exploration & Prototyping
tasks.description: Evaluate AI and Python tools for SOP automation, PI data analysis, and general workflow improvements.
tasks.commentary: Low priority, self-directed. Worked on during downtime.

deliverables.title: Explore AI-assisted workflow opportunities
deliverables.description: Identify use cases where AI or ML could improve engineering efficiency at AltaGas.

deliverables.title: Evaluate SOP automation feasibility
deliverables.description: Assess whether AI can standardize or generate SOPs programmatically.

deliverables.title: Investigate ML models on PI data for operational insights
deliverables.description: Prototype ML approaches for anomaly detection or optimization using PI historian data.
